texto: Words are a powerful aphrodisiac. They have the ability to awaken emotion, to excite the minds and senses. The right words entice, creep and crawl along the skin like the sensuous touch of a skilled lover. THAT my friends, is truly magical indeed...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Shan O' Connor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Words are a powerful aphrodisiac. They have the ability to awaken emotion, to excite the minds an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, reality, words pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
